name: Lemony Leek & Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 large leeks, white and light green parts only
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all stock ingredients in a large pot. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Let the soup cool, then drain before using.
3. Heat olive oil in a soup pot over moderate heat.
4. Add chopped leeks and sauté until they start to go limp, stirring frequently.
5. Add stock mixture, turnips, celery, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add tomatoes (with their juice) and mushrooms. Simmer another 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat.
8. Allow the soup to cool or refrigerate overnight before serving.
9. Before serving, reheat the soup through, add parsley and dill, and top each serving with matzo farfel if desired.
